/about.title: Goood Co.
/about.description: GOOOD is a behavior-driven design and technology company that helps organizations build products, brands, systems, and experiences.
p: Behavior-driven innovation studio integrating strategy, design, technology, and growth through one unified methodology.
Organizations have never had more tools, more technology, or more information.
Yet many struggle with fragmented experiences, disconnected decisions, and inconsistent execution.
We believe exceptional outcomes emerge when quality, behavior, design, innovation, and technology work together as one system.
Specialist in connecting behavior, design, technology, and business to create solutions that generate impact at scale.

Throughout his career, he has led products, platforms, and global initiatives that impact more than 100 million lives annually, serving organizations across 7+ countries, 10,000+ institutions, and more than 1 million professionals.
GOOOD was born from years of experience building complex solutions and from the conviction that quality is the most important factor in creating consistent and meaningful impact.
Specialist in connecting design, motion, technology, and creative strategy to create visual systems that move brands forward.

Throughout his career, he has led motion, 3D, visual design, and creative technology initiatives across broadcasting, entertainment, digital products, and global brand campaigns, working with multidisciplinary teams and high-profile organisations in Brazil and the UK.
“Design with purpose. Craft with care. Build with technology. Create work that people remember.”
